code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test21-FEB-2020Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low CO₂, high chloride, and significant proteinuria, suggesting impaired renal function, possibly chronic kidney disease. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, and mild ketonuria, but no hematuria or leukocyturia. Findings are consistent with renal dysfunction; recommend nephrology evaluation and further workup for underlying etiology.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
